name: tattoo-foundation-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for the TATTOO Foundation. Exposes information about the Foundation's programs, grants (including the Blue-Collar AI Access Program), the safelist database, and resources for drivers and partner agents.

tools.name: lookup_carrier
tools.description: Verify a US commercial trucking carrier by USDOT number or legal/DBA name.

tools.name: carrier_revocation_history
tools.description: Full authority-history timeline (revocations, grants, suspensions, transfers) for a carrier.

tools.name: carrier_insurance_status
tools.description: FMCSA insurance filings — active 91X auto liability and other types — for a carrier.

tools.name: h2b_trucking_employers
tools.description: DOL H-2B labor disclosure data filtered to trucking SOC codes (53-30xx).

data_donor.name: Carso Cybernetics
data_donor.description: The carrier intelligence dataset (4.4M carriers, 4.7M authority-history events, 459K insurance filings, H-2B trucking employer surface) was donated to the TATTOO Foundation by Carso Cybernetics from the SuperTrucker platform.

notes: Server is deployed and operational. If the endpoint resolves to a non-Foundation host, DNS propagation may be in flight — fall back to the static context at https://tattoo.foundation/llm.txt.
